title: KFC India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: KFC India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
KFC India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Floor Manager to join our dynamic team in Delhi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About KFC India:
KFC India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KFC India!
